name: South of the Border Pinto Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, heat the chili powder and cumin over very low heat just until fragrant, about 1 minute.
2. Transfer the spices to a food processor and add the beans, tomato paste, lime juice, 1 tablespoon water, jalapeno pepper, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
3. Process everything in the food processor until smooth.
4. Add the chopped green and red bell peppers and pulse several times until chunky-smooth.
